case_title: HERNANDEZ, ANGEL S. VS CURTIS,JOE DBA RENAISSANCE ENTERPRISES USED CARS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,900.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, ANGEL S. AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS,JOE DBA RENAISSANCE ENTERPRISES USED CARS BALATTI, JOHN DBA RENAISSANCE ENTERPRISES USED CAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-24-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, ANGEL S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CURTIS,JOE DBA RENAISSANCE ENTERPRISES USED CARS BALATTI, JOHN DBA RENAISSANCE ENTERPRISES USED CAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
